caption_text: hold my brows babe i’m walking the met. WITH @schiaparelli by @danielroseberry !!!!!!! you are magic daniel i can’t believe i get to wear this perfect perfect dress. 🤍 and to my dream team @makkaroo @rosegrandquist @hairbyiggy @makeupbyariel @nailsbyzola @jimmyjimmycoco @gregswalesart

caption_text:
born in LA <3
launching tuesday 04.28 on khy.com.

this new collection is made almost entirely here in los angeles, where i’m from and where our team calls home <3

we played with hand-studded embellishment across the collection, every detail placed with intention.

pieces you can live in, but that still feel special.

can’t wait for this <33 

with love from LA, @khy
me + my lip liner + and my kitty ♾️

born in LA <3 this new collection for @khy is very personal to me. it’s inspired, designed, and almost all of it made here in los angeles. i can’t wait for this and everything we have coming this year and beyond! .. from LA to wherever you are. xx ky

got thirsty making this post 🤤 .. hydration, but make it pretttyyy. 

meet your new daily glow ritual
an advanced skin hydration mix powered by:

• 5 essential electrolytes
• hyaluronic acid for deep, dewy hydration
• VERISOL® collagen peptides

clinically shown to support skin elasticity and boost hydration 

zero sugar. no artificial flavors. just results you can see (and sip)

glow different 💧 new @drinksprinter advanced hydration dropping tomorrow this wednesday 4/8 on drinksprinter.com
